description_long: This is a rectangular box of Emperador chocolate-flavored cookies, featuring a predominantly black background with gold and white accents. The front face displays the brand name 'Emperador' in a gold, ornate label, alongside an image of chocolate chip cookies and the product description 'Galletita dulce sabor Chocolate.' The sides of the box repeat the branding and include a barcode, recycling symbol, and additional product information. The top of the box is marked with large 'L2' labels in gray on a white background, likely for inventory or distribution purposes. The packaging appears to be made of cardboard, designed to protect the cookies inside and provide clear branding for retail environments. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, with a focus on the chocolate flavor and the Emperador brand.
description: A rectangular black and gold Emperador cookie box with chocolate chip cookie imagery and clear branding, designed for retail display.
description_view_0: Front view shows the Emperador logo, cookie image, and product description in Spanish.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the Emperador logo and a partial cookie image, with less text detail.
description_view_2: Top view displays large 'L2' labels on a white background, with the Emperador logo partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view features a barcode, recycling symbol, and product information in a gold label.
attribute_brand_logo: The Emperador brand logo is visible on the front and side faces, featuring a gold ornate label with black text and a cookie image.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front face displays the text 'sabor Chocolate' and an image of chocolate chip cookies, indicating chocolate flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A small white text block on the front and a gold label on the side likely contain nutritional or product information, but details are not fully legible.
